ship_decision_applies_to: Windows and macOS desktop application, documentation, CI, and release workflow

gate_results.cold_clone: pass (frozen install, 8 tests, and production build)
gate_results.pnpm_check: pass (format, lint, typecheck, 8 tests, production build)
gate_results.cargo_test: pass (13 tests; 50-repeat stress run also passed)
gate_results.cargo_audit: pass (no vulnerabilities; 17 allowed transitive maintenance warnings)
gate_results.latest_remote_ci: pass on Windows, macOS, dependency audit, and security audit

fixes_applied.description: Preserve the user's Always on Top preference when reopening the widget
Handle native state-subscription failures and cover the error path with a test
Block tagged releases unless Spotify, signing, and notarization credentials are complete
Add a release preflight gate and least-privilege workflow permissions
Bundle Manrope locally so packaged rendering is offline and CSP-compatible
Add weekly dependency maintenance for npm, Cargo, and GitHub Actions

claims_tested.claim: Automated frontend and Rust verification commands pass
Windows and macOS native compile in CI
Signed NSIS/MSI and notarized universal macOS artifacts can be published
Spotify authorization, playback, queue, transport, and persistence work end to end

critical_path: Configure Spotify, Windows signing, and Apple signing/notarization secrets in GitHub Actions
Run the Windows and macOS native smoke checklists with real Spotify playback
Create a signed release candidate and verify every downloaded artifact on clean machines
sections_skipped: Signed packaging and notarization: credentials unavailable
Spotify account journey: client ID, user authorization, and physical macOS runner unavailable
